fields.coeNotes: Small hub-and-spoke AI CoE (4 FTE) under the CDO: standards, model governance, platform. Delivery stays in claims IT.
fields.talentNotes: Hire 1 MLOps engineer (Q1) and 1 ML engineer (Q2); upskill 6 data engineers via the vendor academy; adjuster AI-literacy training before pilot.
fields.structureNotes: Create a product-owner role for "Claims AI" in the claims business, not IT. SIU gets a named model-feedback responsibility.
fields.partnerNotes: Azure account team for platform; boutique ML partner for the first build with contractual knowledge transfer; university collaboration for fraud-pattern research.
